resolvedGaps.closure: Every current or planned Card 3 protected surface has a RouteCapabilityProfile row, with unknown protected routes denied by default.
IdentityEvidenceEnvelope stores encrypted append-only vault references, digests, disclosure classes, and masked display hints only outside the vault.
Future records and booking-style surfaces are represented now as denied placeholders so activation requires explicit trust review.
Manual override and identity repair can narrow or recover capability posture but cannot mutate IdentityBinding outside IdentityBindingAuthority.
The route registry carries unknownProfileBehavior=deny and an explicit fallback row for unknown protected routes.

deferredScope.boundary: NHS login/OIDC transaction detail and local session implementation remain out of this trust-kernel freeze.
Patient-link confidence scoring and optional PDS enrichment remain out of this trust-kernel freeze.
Telephony evidence-readiness details remain out of this trust-kernel freeze.
